channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Stock futures slip as traders await inflation reading, monitor Iran war developments: Live updates
item.description: Economists polled by Dow Jones are calling for headline CPI to have gained 3.7% from a year earlier.

item.title: EBay rejects GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'
item.description: Many analysts questioned the deal, citing questions about how GameStop would finance the transaction and the strategic rationale.

item.title: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
item.description: Retail traders are buying calls in Cboe's "Mag 10" stocks – the big seven plus AMD, Palantir and Broadcom – at the heaviest 10-day clip since 2021, according to a report from the exchange.

item.title: Bulls and bears both believe this could be 1999 all over again. Embrace it or dump your tech stocks?
item.description: We are not guaranteed a close rerun of the 1999-2000 extremes. Just because things got crazier then doesn't mean that's ahead of us.

item.title: This home improvement stock has lagged in 2026. Citi says it's time to buy
item.description: Lowe's, which is trading at a discount, is likely to see its shares rise as it continues to clock strong same store sales despite economic concerns, per Citi.

item.title: Hims & Hers plummets 15% after first-quarter loss, weak earnings guidance
item.description: Hims & Hers reached a deal with Novo Nordisk in March to sell its GLP-1 weight loss drug Wegovy on its platform.

item.title: U.S. crude oil tops $100 again as hope fades for a U.S.-Iran peace deal
item.description: Oil prices rose Tuesday amid concerns over a prolonged Middle East conflict after President Trump's comments that the ceasefire with Iran is on "life support"

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: On Holding, Under Armour, GameStop, AST SpaceMobile & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

item.title: Amazon accelerates delivery race with 30-minute dropoffs in dozens of U.S. cities
item.description: Amazon has been gradually speeding up its delivery windows, after getting customers hooked on two-day and next-day shipping.

item.title: On Holding beats first-quarter expectations, sees double-digit growth in China as Nike lags
item.description: Swiss sneaker company On beat Wall Street's expectations on the top and bottom lines, helped in part by strong sales in China.

item.title: Trump is taking more than a dozen U.S. executives to China. Jensen Huang isn't one of them
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang isn't going on Trump’s China trip, though more than a dozen other U.S. executives are.

item.title: What's at stake for trade, Taiwan and Iran in Trump's high-risk summit with China's Xi
item.description: China experts anticipate Trump and Xi may announce trade deals or other agreements, such as a Chinese purchase of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.

item.title: Crypto legislation faces another hurdle: Labor unions
item.description: Major labor groups ask senators in a letter obtained first by CNBC to oppose a crypto bill over concerns retirement accounts could be harmed.

item.title: UK MPs are turning on PM Starmer — Now analysts say he's unlikely to last the year
item.description: Analysts have slashed the odds of Starmer facing a leadership challenge by September.

item.title: SoftBank has injected $450 million into this British AI chip company
item.description: U.K.-based Graphcore is developing AI chips and systems and was acquired by the Japanese giant in 2024.

item.title: Google says it likely thwarted effort by hacker group to use AI for 'mass exploitation event'
item.description: Hackers are rapidly adopting AI to find previously unknown software flaws even without the help of Anthropic's powerful Mythos model.

item.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
item.description: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.

item.title: AI will drive Nvidia higher by more than 40% from here, says Wells Fargo
item.description: The bank, which has an overweight rating on the chipmaker, raised its price target on the stock.

item.title: GM cutting hundreds of salaried IT workers as it trims costs, evaluates needs
item.description: General Motors is laying off hundreds of salaried employees in its information technology operations.

item.title: A beat-and-raise is key for Qnity — plus, high stakes for CEOs on Trump China trip
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Former Tesla CFO Deepak Ahuja joins EV battery recycler Redwood Materials
item.description: Before joining Redwood Materials, Ahuja served as chief financial and business officer at the drone delivery startup Zipline for about three years.

item.title: The best places to buy gold coins online
item.description: Buying gold coins online to diversify your investment portfolio is simple with these four dealers.

item.title: OpenAI revenue chief Dresser says enterprise AI adoption is 'at a tipping point'
item.description: The OpenAI Development Company is a partnership with 19 investment and consultancy firms and is majority-owned and controlled by the startup.

item.title: Redistricting war isn't over, Democrats say as Jeffries calls a meeting this week
item.description: Democrats are vowing to fight on after being dealt a series of blows in the partisan fight to redraw congressional maps ahead of the 2026 midterms.

item.title: OpenAI trial: Nadella says Musk never raised concerns to him about Microsoft investment
item.description: Elon Musk named Microsoft as a defendant in his lawsuit against OpenAI

item.title: 'Starmer drama': UK borrowing costs hit post-2008 peak as leadership fears hit bond markets
item.description: More than 70 Labour MPs have called on Keir Starmer to resign.

item.title: India’s inflation in April rises for sixth straight month, but undershoots estimates
item.description: Disruptions from the Middle East conflict pose a risk to India's economic growth and inflation.

item.title: Asia's trillion-dollar titans are powering — and distorting — its fastest growing stock markets
item.description: Taiwan's Taiex and South Korea's Kospi stock markets have been seeing record breaking rallies. The stunning surge leaves experts wondering if this growth hinges largely on a few AI-linked semiconductor giants.

item.title: Saudi Aramco CEO says oil market won't normalize until 2027 if Hormuz disruption persists
item.description: Oil inventories are rapidly drawing down as the Strait of Hormuz remains closed, Saudi Aramco CEO Amin Nasser said.

item.title: Parabolic AI rally has bulls eyeing a comeback for this one-time meme metal trade
item.description: Silver prices surged 7% Monday to the highest since March.
